RecommendedValue: Existing external users only (or more restrictive)
Remediation: SharePoint admin center > Policies > Sharing > Set to Existing guests.
SharePoint admin center > Policies > Sharing > Uncheck Allow guests to share.
SharePoint admin center > Policies > Sharing > Limit sharing by domain.
SharePoint admin center > Settings > Sync > Restrict to domain-joined.
Entra admin center > Conditional Access > Session controls > Sign-in frequency.
SharePoint admin center > Policies > Sharing > Default link type > Specific people.
Set guest expiration to 30 days or less.
SharePoint admin center > Sharing > Verification code reauth > 30 days.
SharePoint admin center > Sharing > Default permission > View.
